name: sk-code
description: Smart-routing umbrella skill for application code work — detects stack first (Webflow, React/Next.js, Go) then classifies intent and loads stack-aware resources. Stacks: WEBFLOW (live — Webflow / vanilla animation web), NEXTJS (stub — Next.js 14 + vanilla-extract + motion v12 + react-hook-form/zod + react-aria + Untitled UI; scaffolded for a future Next.js project), GO (stub — gin + sqlc + Postgres + golang-jwt; scaffolded for a future Go service). Cross-stack pairing doc captures the React↔Go API contract. Other stacks fall through to UNKNOWN.
trigger_examples: implement Next.js App Router page with vanilla-extract styling
add a Server Action with zod validation
build a gin handler with sqlc and Postgres
set up JWT auth between Next.js and Go
write a Next.js form with motion v12 transitions
create a Go service that pairs with the Next.js frontend
verify Go service builds and tests pass
